redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
Congratulations on earning an in-game reward for King of Meat! In order to claim it, follow these steps:

o        Visit the King of Meat Code Redemption Website.  
o        Select your preferred platform and log in to your account.  
o        Enter the code you received from the Discord Quest and hit "Redeem Reward".   You should see a confirmation message.  
o        The redeemed Item will appear in your inventory once you reach Contender Rank 2 in-game.  

**Reward Available: 10/7/2025 @ 10 AM PDT – 10/13/2025 @ 4:59 PM PDT **

Log in to redeem your code at: https://www.ea.com/games/battlefield/battlefield-6/redeem

1. Log in to your EA Account   
2. Redeem your in-game codes  
3. Link your platforms to your EA Account to play on any platform

How To Use Redeem Codes:  
1. Once you have a Redeem Code, head over to https://tinyurl.com/yzavuyet, sign up or create an account to redeem it!   
2. To proceed, you will need to go to your account, redeem your reward and copy/paste your Redeem Code.  
3. Once your code is successfully redeemed, the reward will be available in the full game once your link your PROS account in-game by scanning the QR Code.  

**Please note, the Redeem Code is valid from Coordinated Universal Time (UTC): October 16, 2025, 9:00:00 AM to October 23, 2025, 8:59:59 AM.**

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
How to redeem:
Visit the code redemption page on the official website of Honkai: Star Rail (https://hsr.hoyoverse.com/gift). Log in to your game account and follow the instructions to input the code. Once redeemed, you will receive the Bundle through the in-game mail system.

Redemption Code Content: Stellar Jade ×30*, Credit ×20,000, Lost Gold Fragment ×4, Condensed Aether ×5, Traveler's Guide ×3.

* Rewards are limited to 750,000 and will be available exclusively to the first 750,000 Trailblazers who successfully complete the Quest. The distribution of rewards will be based on when the codes were redeemed after completing the task, and they will be distributed on a first-come, first-served basis.

* The redemption code will expire on 2025/12/3 11:00:00 (UTC+8). We highly recommend redeeming it as soon as possible.

To redeem an offer code on the web:  
1. Visit this website: https://store.pokemongo.com/offer-redemption  
2. Log in using the same credentials you use to access your Pokémon GO account.  
3. Enter your offer code.  
4. After successfully redeeming an offer code, a message will display the items added to your inventory.  

**The redemption code will expire on November 16, 2025, at 08:00 AM UTC (12:00 AM PST). We highly recommend redeeming it as soon as possible.**

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
How to claim your mining ship:

Visit the code [activation page](https://login.eveonline.com/account/logon?ReturnUrl=%2Fv2%2Foauth%2Fauthorize%3Fresponse_type%3Dcode%26client_id%3Daccount_management%26redirect_uri%3Dhttps%3A%2F%2Fsecure.eveonline.com%2Flogin%2Fssocallback%26scope%3Dmammonservice.userDataRead.v1%2520mammonservice.userDataWrite.v1%2520cisservice.customerRead.v1%2520cisservice.customerWrite.v1%2520cisservice.entitlementsRead.v1%2520sso.credentialsWrite.v1%2520vgs.marketAccess.v1%2520mammonservice.webPurchase.v1%2520cisservice.userProfileBasic.v1%2520secure.account.v1%26state%3Df82c5679-d5ef-4a5f-a99a-a98edd466177).  
Register or log in to your EVE Online account.  
Enter your Quest code.  
Log into EVE Online and claim your ship from the redemption queue. You can access the queue by clicking the disc icon at the bottom left of your screen.

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
Codes are not platform specific and are redeemed from within the Apex Legends Storefront.        
1. Boot Apex Legends on your platform of choice.  
2. When on the lobby screen select [Store].  
3. Select [Redeem Code] on the bottom left.  
4. Enter the code you received.  
5. Select [Redeem].    

Requires EA account.

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
How do I redeem a code in Rocket League?  
Some items can be placed in your inventory by entering your redemption code through the in-game menu. To do this, follow the below steps:   
Launch Rocket League.  
Select Settings from the menu.  
Select Extras.  
Select Redeem Code.  
Type in the in-game redemption code. 
All codes need to be entered exactly as they are printed. Make sure to include the dashes (-) and avoid adding extra spaces at the beginning or the end of the code  
Select OK.

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
To redeem an offer code on the web:
Visit this website: https://store.pokemongo.com/offer-redemption
Log in using the same credentials you use to access your Pokémon GO account.
Enter your offer code.
After successfully redeeming an offer code, a message will display the items added to your inventory.
The redemption code will expire on March 31, 2026, at 11:59 PM PST. We highly recommend redeeming it as soon as possible.

To redeem your THE FINALS Season 10 Quest gift code, visit Embark's code redemption website and log in to your account: https://id.embark.games/id/the-finals/giveaway  
Paste your gift code to obtain your Skill Issue 3.0 set.  
Requires THE FINALS; redeem by December 31, 2026.

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0: How to redeem:  Visit the code redemption page on the official website of Honkai: Star Rail (https://hsr.hoyoverse.com/gift).  Log in to your game account and follow the instructions to input the code.  Once redeemed, you will receive the Bundle through the in-game mail system.   Redemption Code Content: Stellar Jade ×30*, Credit ×20,000, Lost Gold Fragment ×4, Condensed Aether ×5, Traveler's Guide ×3.   *Rewards are limited to 900,000 redemption codes. The redemption code will expire on 2026/05/20 11:00:00 (UTC+8).

redemption_instructions_by_platform.0:
1. Open the URL https://aka.ms/DiscordXDL20.  
2. Customise your controller and add it to your cart.  
3. Select APPLY CODE under Order Summary and enter your code in the discount code box, select APPLY DISCOUNT.  
4. Your 20% discount will appear in your order total — complete purchase as guest or with an account.    
Terms & Conditions: Offer applies only to Elite Wireless Controllers and Standard Wireless Controllers in the Xbox Design Lab. This offer ends on 30th June 2026 or while stocks last. The promo code must be entered at checkout to receive the discount. Not valid for previous orders or purchases. This offer is non-transferable and cannot be exchanged for cash. May not be combined with other offers. Any applicable taxes are the responsibility of the recipient. Please allow 6–8 weeks for delivery. Standard engraving terms and conditions apply. Microsoft reserves the right to cancel, change or suspend this offer at any time without notice.
